title: flindersia collina
intro: Flindersia collina, also known as the Yellow Box or Yellow Ironwood, is a species of tree native to the tropical rainforests of northern Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Studies have shown that Flindersia collina has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antiviral activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Australian Aboriginal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
